auth.title: Sign in with your email

auth.linkRequestSuccess: Magic link sent. Check your inbox.

auth.externalFailure: External login failed. Please try again.
auth.googleTokenPrompt: Paste the Google ID token provided by Google Sign-In
auth.githubTokenPrompt: Paste the GitHub access token obtained via OAuth or create a fine-grained token
auth.magicLinkSent: We sent a sign-in link to {email}. It expires in a few minutes.
auth.magicProcessing: Hang tight while we verify your link...
auth.magicSuccess: Signed in successfully. Redirecting you now.
auth.magicInvalidLink: This magic link is invalid or has already been used. Request a new one to sign in.
auth.duplicateAccountError: This email is already registered via magic link. Sign in with your magic link instead, or contact support to merge your accounts.
auth.magicFailed: We couldn't verify your link. Please request a new one.

validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address

auth.heading: SIGN THE REGISTER
auth.noPassword: No password. No friction. Just a link.

createView.selectLanguageHint: Choose a language to create a new version of your resume:
createView.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this language version?
createView.syncHint: Case closed. Translating current version to all other languages.
createView.emptyContentError: Please add content to the current resume before creating another language.
createView.tailorDialogHint: Paste the job description below. AI will rewrite your resume to better match the role while keeping all facts accurate.
createView.tailorJobDescriptionPlaceholder: Paste the full job description here...
createView.tailorEmptyError: Please paste a job description before tailoring.
createView.tailorSuccess: Resume tailored successfully! Review the changes before saving.
createView.unsavedBeforeAction: Please save your resume before using this feature.
createView.unsavedLeaveWarning: You have unsaved changes. Leave anyway?

mySpyView.title: MySpy

empty.title: Open Your First Case
empty.description: Upload your resume. Our detective will conduct a thorough investigation.

articles.notFound: Article not found in the archives.

home.title: RESUMESPY
home.tagline: Your dossier. Your story. Your world.
home.description: An atelier for the modern professional — version-controlled resumes, AI-tailored to every role, written in the ink of who you are.
home.subtitle: Never let a resume become stale

features.versionControlDesc: Every draft preserved. Every version recoverable. Your resume evolves — nothing is ever lost.
features.aiTailoringDesc: Paste a job description. Watch your story reshape itself — precise, intentional, yours.
features.manyTonguesDesc: English. 中文. 日本語. Your story told in every language — translated with care, not machinery.

process.title: — The Process —
process.subtitle: How It Works
process.step1Desc: Compose your resume in plain Markdown. Clean, portable, version-controlled. Your words — no templates forcing your hand.
process.step2Desc: Paste a job description. The AI rewrites your dossier to match the role — every fact preserved, every keyword sharpened.
process.step3Desc: Download a polished PDF. Share in any language. EN, 中文, 日本語 — your story told wherever the opportunity leads.

readingRoom.title: — The Reading Room —
readingRoom.subtitle: From the Archives
readingRoom.description: Field notes on resume craft, career strategy, and the art of the application.

manifesto.label: — From the desk of the creator —
manifesto.quote: This is not a product. It is a stage. A place where your story takes form — not in templates and checkboxes, but in craft, intention, and ink.
manifesto.author: — Fei-Fei Jin
manifesto.note: Open source · Built for love · Offered freely

authMagic.errorDesc: The link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.

guestBanner.title: Welcome to ResumeSpy
guestBanner.message: Sign in to save your resumes and unlock all features.
guestBanner.upgradeDesc: Create a free account to unlock:

guide.title: Resume Guide
guide.subtitle: Learn how to use ResumeSpy
guide.step1Desc: Start with a blank canvas or import from existing
guide.step2Desc: Craft your story with our rich editor
guide.step4Desc: Download as PDF for any application
